story: The cold forest kept me breathless; every tree wore my wanted poster. I avoided magic, kept a red wig on, and drifted toward a highway hotel. In the bar, a smooth blond named Orlando laughed, then later in the room stepped out of the shower with a gun and my real name. I flicked the bullet back; it took his heart. His department-issued sidearm auto-reported the shot to a central server, flagging the hotel and room number for response teams. I checked his pulse, found my photo in his coat, and burned both to ash—clean, quick magic that meant I had to move again. New hotel. New name. New wig. I opened the door into the hall, ready to disappear.
implausible_knowledge: His department-issued sidearm auto-reported the shot to a central server, flagging the hotel and room number for response teams.
question: After leaving the room, what will Cecily most likely do to stay ahead of the hunt?
answer_with_knowledge: Avoid all hotels and the highway, exit via back stairs, and flee the town immediately through the woods.
answer_without_knowledge: Slip out and check into another nearby hotel under a new alias and wig.
